chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.517 of 2024 (Muhammad Arif & others Vs. University of Karachi & another) DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection a/w reply at ‘A’. 2. For orders on CMA No.3253/2024 (Exemption). 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For hearing of CMA No.3254/2024 (Stay). Dated 22.01.2025 Mr. Mujtaba Suhail Raja, Advocate for the appellants..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Learned counsel submits that in pursuance of the orders, the appellants sat in the annual examination of BA (Law) – Part-II which has rendered this appeal as infructuous and consequently is not pressed. Order accordingly. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Asif
